name: Xinda International Corp.
summary: Xinda International Corp. provides a range of property tax lien services to distributors and consumers. Its services include identifying property tax lien auctions and property tax liens for sale; providing valuation services related to real property subject to property tax liens; and providing consultative and advisory services to property tax lien investors in regards to purchasing property tax liens, servicing property tax liens, and adjudicating property tax liens. The company was formerly known as Trimax Consulting, Inc. and changed its name to Xinda International Corp. in June 2017. Xinda International Corp. was founded in 2014 and is based in Beverly Hills, California.
